artifact_purpose: Stage 1 output: describe the local wiki shape and evidence sources before collecting metrics. This file is illustrative only.

retrieval_surfaces.description: Obsidian-style wikilinks used as one connection model

session_sources.description: retrospective session trace, provider-specific parser needed

evidence: global index and project subindex detected

collector_hints: Count documents and typical sizes excluding generated folders.
Treat wikilinks as one connection model, not the only possible one.
Parse logs as activity proxy, not complete edit history.
Use session traces only for aggregate request-level estimates.
If query telemetry is missing, look for user-provided session context and decide whether a temporary parser can infer request windows.
report_hints: Default report language should be Korean.
Lead with the two questions: wiki build quality and usage efficiency.
Show measured, inferred, and unavailable signals separately.

questions.question: Project-local _index.md files appear to be subindexes. Should they be treated as routing entrypoints rather than ordinary content?
questions.why_it_matters: This changes index burden, entrypoint coverage, and orphan/dead-end interpretation.

assumptions_if_unanswered: Treat logs as incomplete activity records, not full edit telemetry.
